ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vulnerabilities" (
  "vulnerability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vulnerability */,
  "no" TEXT /* Identifier number of the vulnerability */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or brief description of the vulnerability */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the vulnerability */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the severity level of the vulnerability */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the vulnerability */,
  "smart_contract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the affected smart contract */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vulnerability */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Description of the potential impact */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommended actions to mitigate the vulnerability */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the person assigned to address the issue */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for resolving the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vulnerability was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vulnerability was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vulnerability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vulnerabilities_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vulnerabilities_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vulnerabilities_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vulnerabilities_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vulnerabilities_smart_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("smart_contract_id") REFERENCES smart_contracts ("smart_contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Authority Control, Integer Overflow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category for nested categories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level (e.g., Critical, Medium) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Hex color code for visual representation in reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Ignored, Fixed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "next_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the next possible status for workflow management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Auditor, Developer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field to store permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "vulnerability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vulnerability the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_vulnerability_id FOREIGN KEY ("vulnerability_id") REFERENCES vulnerabilities ("vulnerability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smart_contracts" (
  "smart_contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smart contract */,
  "contract_name" TEXT /* Name of the smart contract */,
  "address" TEXT /* Blockchain address of the smart contract */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the smart contract belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the smart contract was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the smart contract was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smart_contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smart_contracts_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is for */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
